ab: ’inavayan mapiya, harem kana wari inku na sinsi kuy adayaw mu mukuwa i zekalr kiumaumalra kana dawadawanan.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: ’inava wa! iniyam mu karuwa mi temarkatratripulr marengay kana dawdawanan.
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說知本語。
en: B: Okay! We’re going to say Katratripulr to the seniors.

ab: raredek ta lra?
en: A: Are we almost there?

ab: raredek ta lra.
en: B:Almost there.

ab: imu, zuwa mi lra mena’uwa kaninu.
en: A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: wa sayhu mu lra marengay temarkatratripulr yi! salaw kana ’inava!
ch: B:你們會說知本語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B:  You speak Katratripulr! That’s great! *Please change the language to your native language.

ab: ’inavayan mapiya, harem kana wari inku na sinsi kuy adayaw mu mukuwa kikaruna kana ’uma na tinuhusan za dawa.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去小米田工作。
en: A:Hello everyone, today I will take you to work in the millet field.

ab: ai, sinsi.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: alamu uturik kania, amanan na malalup mada kana mu kiyakarun.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: ai, sinsi, mada mi lra kana niyam kiyakarun.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.

ab: medek ta lra?
en: A: Are we there yet?

ab: ’azi ta ziya medek, adawilr ziya.
en: B: Not yet, it’s still far away.

ab: uwa i inu puzanumi.
en: A: You go watering.

ab: ai, inkuwa na puzanum.
en: B: Okay, I’ll water it.

ab: uwa alak za traptrapan na ’a’alrup kana ’ayam.
en: A: You go get the bird catcher.

ab: ai, kayku ’emalrupa kana ’ayam.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: ’inavayan mapiya, harem kana wari awa ta kaziyu kana tunguyuan.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: wa kana ’inava! kakuda ta mukuwa nay?
ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?

ab: waitras ta za bas mukuwa.
en: A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: muturika ta, padadulu ta tremima’a za kippu.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.

ab: ai.
en: B: Yes.

ab: i nganguwayan mu maw na ’ayam ziya, i likakuzan mu maw na unan ziya, inmuwaya lra na mena’una’u.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.

ab: sinsi kaakauz ku za unan.
en: B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: muziya za eman, uwa na’u kana ’ayam.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: nu lemavat za saya tuki mu uveliyas muwazuka ta.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.

ab: ai, lrayuwan sinsi.
en: B: Yes, thank you.

ab: eman nu ’ina’uwan kana wari harem?
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: mena’u ku lra sazu na unan zi sazu na ’ayam.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.

ab: pakunamun, averuk ta lra.
en: A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: ngarayu ku ziya, rapi’ ku kuwi.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.

ab: salrangana ta mukuwa pakulimaya mu?
en: A: Shall we go swimming together?

ab: ai! anlra!
en: B:Yes! Let’s go!

ab: kazuwan na trau i kania pakulalima.
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: asavak i kaziyua, kazuwa ta kania pakulimalima maruwa.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
